name: Calf Stretch with Rope
shortDescription: A static stretch for the calf muscles using a rope or strap to pull the foot into dorsiflexion.
instructions: Sit on the floor with your legs extended. Loop a rope or band around your foot, keep your knee straight, and gently pull your toes toward you to stretch your calf.
steps: Sit on the floor with one leg extended.
Loop a rope or band around the ball of your foot.
Hold ends of rope and gently pull your foot toward you.
Keep knee straight for a deeper stretch.
Hold the stretch and then switch legs.
breathing: Breathe deeply and relax throughout the stretch.
